title: Messy Mod
description: This is the most chaotic mod in the world，very messy!
body:
# Welcome using Messy Mod
## Describe
A mod that is messy.

You can create STRONG things in this mod,such as armor,weapons or somethings...

You can use new tool:Leon to make powerfull things!

Inside the Leon World,the Messian everywhere,don't let him angry!

Someplaces have Leon BOSS!!!

## How to use
Put *.jar file into `<NeoForge Path>\mods`.

## Oh my god!Bugs!!!
To report bugs,go to [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Leonmmcoset/Messy-Mod-Issues/issues) to report a issue!

## Can I use this mod on server?
Yes you can!We tested it on our Minecraft server,and it working great!

You can play this mod with your friend!

## I have some problems!
Go to [Discussions Page](https://github.com/Leonmmcoset/Messy-Mod-Issues/discussions) to talk to us!

## Mod have other mod loader?
Sorry,we only have Forge(Not recommend),NeoForge(Recommend)

Maybe next month we will update to Fabric(But mostly not).

## Happy Time!
There are a Easter egg in the mod,gonna find it!

## About Game Die Setting
The Game Die Setting is on Messy GUI

You should to set gamerule doGameDieSetting to True to use it

If on,you can press key:`Insert` or use command `/gdsoff` to off.

**Warning!The Game Die Setting can made a cilent or a server CRASH!PLEASE USE IT WITH CAUTION!!!**

**If you are not using the Game Die Setting,please set gamerule doGameDieSetting to False!!!!!**

**If lose some data,the author of the mod are no liability to fix it or compensation to damages!**

## Thanks for:
**Monster**:The skin of Messian

**Dream**:The skin of Messy BOSS

---
Try it!Have a great time while playing this mod!

Made by LeonMMcoset
